# VSCode Icons Vendor Assets

Source package: @iconify-json/vscode-icons@1.2.46
Icon set version: 12.18.0
Homepage: https://icon-sets.iconify.design/vscode-icons/
License: MIT

Generated files:
- icons.json: original Iconify JSON data
- svg/: one local SVG file per icon name
- vscode-icons-map.js: local icon-name index used by CodeMark
